title: Dasispermum humile
taxonomy: Dasispermum humile is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant is part of the genus Dasispermum, which is a group of plants primarily found in Australia. The family Apiaceae, also known as the carrot or parsley family, is a large and diverse group of plants. Dasispermum humile is native to the southwestern part of Western Australia. It is a small, shrub-like plant that grows in a variety of habitats.

It is traditionally used to alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties.
